scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w packages/types && npm run build -w packages/config && npm run build -w packages/logging && npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/queues && npm run build -w packages/core && npm run build -w packages/db
scripts.build:apps: npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/gateway && npm run build -w apps/mt5-adapter && npm run build -w apps/worker-news && npm run build -w apps/worker-market && npm run build -w apps/worker-validation && npm run build -w apps/worker-execution && npm run build -w apps/worker-supervisor && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build:apps
scripts.test: npm run test -w packages/core && npm run test -w packages/config && npm run test -w apps/api
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w apps/api && npm run lint -w apps/web
